name: urbancart-monorepo
description: Root runner for UrbanCart Frontend and Backend

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix simple-product-app
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix simple-product-app"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix simple-product-app"
